overview.description: The Sterling Capital Short Duration Bond ETF (SCSB) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in investment grade fixed income. The fund is actively managed and invests primarily in investment grade fixed income securities with a short duration profile. The strategy emphasizes income generation and total return through sector allocation and security selection SCSB was launched on Mar 30, 2026 and is issued by Sterling Capital.
